message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 435 — doc refresh + mid-flight finding capture

Attaches tick-435 bead comment noting the evidence-doc refresh to
106/106 with the new §2.6.1 mid-flight cancel finding section
(commit 03ee9e78). Callers needing mid-flight cancel on asupersync
recv primitives now have a documented workaround pattern in the
evidence doc itself.
